It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses. Tax A

a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses. Tax A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments. Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund. Exit load A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of

exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment. Stamp duty A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security. Exit Load 22 Sep 2017 Exit load of 0.25% if redeemed within 3 days 18 Dec 2013 Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 3 months 01 Jan 2013 Exit load of 1.00% if units are redeemed/ switched out within 30 days from the date of allotment. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Arun Agarwal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC NIFTY 50 Index Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under

Fund Manager of HDFC NIFTY 50 Index Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,34,238 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 15 Jun 2026 is ₹232.38. The HDFC NIFTY 50 Index Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 0.25% if redeemed within 3 days ; Investment Objective The Scheme seeks to generate returns that are commensurate with the performance of the NIFTY 50 Index,

Scheme seeks to generate returns that are commensurate with the performance of the NIFTY 50 Index, subject to tracking errors.
